compact_manager.detail: The installed compact manager version does not match the pinned Midnight lane.
compact_manager.fix: Install Compact manager 0.5.1 to match the pinned Midnight toolchain lane.
compact_manager.label: Compact manager

dust.detail: DUST balance is not checkable from a bare CLI process.
dust.fix: Run the browser-assisted Lace check or supply a project with installed Midnight dependencies and headless wallet credentials.
dust.label: Spendable tDUST

gateway.expected: ready gateway with compactc 0.30.0 and attestor key exposure
gateway.fix: Start the gateway with `zkf midnight gateway serve --port 6311` after installing compactc 0.30.0.
gateway.label: Midnight Compact gateway

notes: Local Midnight proof server is healthy on http://127.0.0.1:6300 according to both the Bitrove ops bundle and midnight doctor.
Gateway access is currently protected and returns a missing Cloudflare Access JWT assertion instead of open readiness.
Preview RPC reachability is the only hard fail in the live doctor run used for this report.

proof_server.fix: Start or restart the native proof server with `zkf midnight proof-server serve --engine umpg`.
proof_server.label: Midnight proof server

recommended_fixes: Install Compact manager 0.5.1 to match the pinned Midnight toolchain lane.
Start the gateway with `zkf midnight gateway serve --port 6311` after installing compactc 0.30.0.

wallet.detail: No browser wallet session or headless operator wallet credentials were available.
wallet.expected: A Midnight wallet session bound to the selected network
wallet.fix: Provide MIDNIGHT_WALLET_SEED or MIDNIGHT_WALLET_MNEMONIC, or allow the browser-assisted Lace check.
wallet.label: Wallet session
